business_question: Which products generate the largest return volumes and return amounts?
business_context: Product quality teams need to identify products driving return-related losses.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    p.PRODUCT_NAME,
    SUM(r.UNITS_RETURNED) AS TOTAL_RETURN_UNITS,
    SUM(r.RETURN_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_RETURN_AMOUNT
FROM FACT_RETURNS r
JOIN DIM_PRODUCT p
    ON r.PRODUCT_KEY = p.PRODUCT_KEY
GROUP BY p.PRODUCT_NAME
ORDER BY TOTAL_RETURN_AMOUNT DESC;
